archimate:DataObject.name: DCAT
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: DCAT enables a publisher to describe datasets and data services in a catalog using a standard model and vocabulary that facilitates the consumption and aggregation of metadata from multiple catalogs. This can increase the discoverability of datasets and data services.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/vocab-dcat-2/
LOST view: SV-Agnostic Ontologies
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DCATDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/DCATDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/ControlledVocabularyDataObject

properties.value: DCAT enables a publisher to describe datasets and data services in a catalog using a standard model and vocabulary that facilitates the consumption and aggregation of metadata from multiple catalogs. This can increase the discoverability of datasets and data services.
